message:
test(proptest): add 20 serde roundtrip tests for previously untested plan types

Coverage for: MissionOwnership, MissionProvenance, ReservationIntentId,
ReservationIntent, DispatchContract, DispatchTarget, DispatchDryRun,
MissionDispatchContract, MissionDispatchTarget, MissionDispatchExecution,
MissionLifecycleDecision, MissionAgentAvailability,
MissionAgentCapabilityProfile, TxPrepareReport, TxPrepareOutcome.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
